title: Behind you is me
description:
Your alone, nobodys here, your scared but you hear something, its here, there is no way out you

will be next.
you will be no more.
its not worth it escaping.
body:
# Behind you is me

![Execute (one of the main entitys) Photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c9dda3f0828015ce743d8d10db4c4051514ae98.png)

### About this mod

Your alone, nobodys here, your scared but you hear something, its here, there is no way out you

will be next.

## DISCLAIMERS/NOTE:

EVENTS MAY HAPPEN WHEN WORLD JOINED/LOADING CHUNKS

BUGS MAY HAPPEN, SO DONT EXPECT THE BEST EXPIERIENCE

THIS CAN CRASH/LAG YOUR GAME ALOT IF YOU HAVE A BAD PC

THIS CONTAINS REALLY LOUD NOISES (headphones warning)

**THIS MOD CONTAINS JUMPSCARES/NOT FOR LIGHT HEARTED PEOPLE, OR WITH HEART ISSUES AND EPILEPSY**

**SOME ENTITYS ARE BASED OFF OF THE BROKEN SCRIPT by wendigodrip**

**Mods that can make the game expierience better with this mod, and texture packs:**

Dynamic lighting

Remastered Sound physics

AlphaPack texture pack for nostalgia ;)

### CREDITS
Creator/Delevoper \: CryptidNobody

Ideas: CryptidNobody mar1zzzz

Mod originality: The broken script (also try no_moon)

Links for other good TBS mods:

https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script     (by wendigodrip and RedstoneWizard08)

https://modrinth.com/mod/no_moon.jar     (by wentworth)


### IF you wanna sumbit ideas for the mod join the discord
